description: This file defines a React component for an asset inspection page within a Next.js application. It handles loading assets, submitting new inspections with optional photos, and displaying the created inspection details. It interacts with backend API endpoints for listing assets and creating inspections.

methods.name: InspectionsPage
methods.description: Main React component rendering the inspection form and handling state.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission, creates a new inspection via API call, manages loading/error states.
